form.formComment: At the latest run second last of 8 at this track on April 1 over 1200m, 5 len behind Meg's Legacy carrying 58.5kg at $67. The start before that ran last in a small field at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 8 len behind Music Of The Night with 50kg at $11. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). At the latest run second last of 8 at this track on April 1 over 1200m, 5 len behind Meg's Legacy carrying 58.5kg at $67. The start before that ran last in a small field at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 8 len behind Music Of The Night with 50kg at $11. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Brushed on the hindquarters shortly after the start by Cantona.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 42-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 7 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1250m, 1.0 len behind Star World with 61.5kg at $4. The race before that 2nd of 9 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Gin Palace carrying 61kg at $6. Has missed the frame just once in career. Low draw and top chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Racing well recently. Returns from a 42-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 7 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1250m, 1.0 len behind Star World with 61.5kg at $4. The race before that 2nd of 9 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Gin Palace carrying 61kg at $6. Has missed the frame just once in career. Low draw and top chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped awkwardly inwards and made contact with Dibble.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd of 8 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1500m, 1.3 len behind Given To Fly with 58kg at $8. The start before that won by 2.25 len at this track February 28 over 1600m defeating Trip To Camelot with 57.5kg at $8. Not far away last start. Best form stacks up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd of 8 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1500m, 1.3 len behind Given To Fly with 58kg at $8. The start before that won by 2.25 len at this track February 28 over 1600m defeating Trip To Camelot with 57.5kg at $8. Not far away last start. Best form stacks up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Elected to race wide on the latter part of the turn.
From the 200m, shifted out continually and caused Count William to be steadied.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start won by 0.8 len at Durbanville March 21 over 1600m defeating See The Sign carrying 56.5kg at $6. Before that 3rd of 9 at this track on February 25 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Alessia Asheville with 55.5kg at $4.50. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Form hard to fault. Last start won by 0.8 len at Durbanville March 21 over 1600m defeating See The Sign carrying 56.5kg at $6. Before that 3rd of 9 at this track on February 25 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Alessia Asheville with 55.5kg at $4.50. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 200m, carried out marginally by Lady Orbit, which shifted out.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 60-day let-up. First-up after two months won by 0.8 len at Durbanville February 14 over 1400m defeating Theleia carrying 60kg at $9. Previously second-up 4th of 10 at this track on November 10 over 1400m, 5 len behind Kattekwaadkwadraad carrying 58kg at $8. Off the mark with a good win fresh. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Second run back. Comes off a 60-day let-up. First-up after two months won by 0.8 len at Durbanville February 14 over 1400m defeating Theleia carrying 60kg at $9. Previously second-up 4th of 10 at this track on November 10 over 1400m, 5 len behind Kattekwaadkwadraad carrying 58kg at $8. Off the mark with a good win fresh. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Threw its head up leaving the stalls and thereafter was slow into stride.

form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 8 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1500m, 1.75 len behind Given To Fly with 58kg at $17. The race before that won by 3 len at Durbanville March 4 over 1400m defeating Fate Of Pace carrying 60kg at $7. Has to find improvement.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Most recently 5th of 8 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1500m, 1.75 len behind Given To Fly with 58kg at $17. The race before that won by 3 len at Durbanville March 4 over 1400m defeating Fate Of Pace carrying 60kg at $7. Has to find improvement.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 200m, tired and caused Surely Not to be steadied.
Slow into stride. Hanging out in the latter stages.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months won by a nose at this track March 30 over 1200m defeating Blue Lagoon carrying 60kg at $6. Previously second-up 6th of 14 at Durbanville on October 25 over 1500m, 4 len behind Lady Veritas carrying 58kg at $4.50. Strong winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6.5). Second run back. First-up after five months won by a nose at this track March 30 over 1200m defeating Blue Lagoon carrying 60kg at $6. Previously second-up 6th of 14 at Durbanville on October 25 over 1500m, 4 len behind Lady Veritas carrying 58kg at $4.50. Strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 4th of 7 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 1.2 len behind True Horizon with 56.5kg at $3.80. The start before that 3rd of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1250m, 0.8 len behind Lady Look Alike carrying 58.5kg at $9. Among the better chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Form hard to fault. Last start 4th of 7 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 1.2 len behind True Horizon with 56.5kg at $3.80. The start before that 3rd of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1250m, 0.8 len behind Lady Look Alike carrying 58.5kg at $9. Among the better chances.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up ran last of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1250m, 8 len behind Lady Look Alike with 55kg at $26. Second-up second last of 7 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 2.75 len behind True Horizon carrying 52.2kg at $17. Needs to lift.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up ran last of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1250m, 8 len behind Lady Look Alike with 55kg at $26. Second-up second last of 7 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1250m, 2.75 len behind True Horizon carrying 52.2kg at $17. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide on the turn and into the straight. Tired quickly from the 300m.
